zh.lifeSummary: 當Richeza of Denmark於1180年之後出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德時，她的父親Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen8868歲，母親Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark8858歲。她和Erik Knutsson至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1220年5月8日在丹麥。

zh-hans.StockHolm, Stockholm, Sweden: 瑞典斯托可霍爾姆斯托可霍爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richeza of Denmark于1180年之后出生在丹麦洛斯吉爾德时，她的父亲Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen8868岁，母亲Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark8858岁。她和Erik Knutsson至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1220年5月8日在丹麦。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Denmark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

variants.name: Dence
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Herta.

English (Kent): variant of Dench, an ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle English denshe, dench ‘Danish’ (Old English denisc). There were many Danes in England in the Middle Ages, not only the long-established settlers in the Danelaw region, but also more recent immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: When Richeza of Denmark was born after 1180, in Roskilde, Denmark, her father, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, was 8868 and her mother, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, was 8858. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Erik Knutsson. She died on 8 May 1220, in Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richeza of Denmark est née après 1180, à Roskilde, Danemark, son père, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, avait 8868 ans et sa mère, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, avait 8858 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Erik Knutsson. Elle est décédée le 8 mai 1220, à Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richeza of Denmark nach 1180 in Roskilde, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen 8868 und ihre Mutter Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark 8858. Sie hatte mit Erik Knutsson mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Mai 1220 in Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richeza of Denmark è nata il dopo il 1180 nel Roskilde, Danimarca, sua padre, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, aveva 8868 anni e sua madre, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, aveva 8858 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Erik Knutsson. Morì il 8 maggio 1220, nel Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Richeza of Denmarkが1180年以後にデンマークロスキルドで生まれた時，父Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsenは8868歳，母Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmarkは8858歳であった。彼女はErik Knutssonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1220年5月8日にデンマークで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richeza of Denmark(이)가 1180년 이후 덴마크 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen(은)는 8868세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark(은)는 8858세였다. 그녀는 Erik Knutsson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 5월 8일 덴마크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richeza of Denmark nasceu após 1180, em Roskilde, Dinamarca, seu pai, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, tinha 8868 anos e sua mãe, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, tinha 8858 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Erik Knutsson. Ela faleceu em 8 de maio de 1220, em Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richeza of Denmark родилась после 1180 г. в местности роскаилд, Дания, её отцу по имени Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen было 8868 лет, а матери, которую звали Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, 8858. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Erik Knutsson. Она умерла 8 мая 1220 г. в местности Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richeza of Denmark nació después de 1180, en Roskilde, Dinamarca, su papá, Valdemar 'den Store' Knudsen, tenía 8868 años y su mamá, Sofie Volodarsdatter, Vladimirovna Glebovich, von Minsk, Polotsk, Novgorod, Droning of Denmark, tenía 8858 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Erik Knutsson. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1220, en Dinamarca.
